message.content: Let's add tests to this repo. I prefer pytest over unittest - way less boilerplate.

content.text: Agreed, pytest it is. I'll set up the test directory.

message.content: Also heads up: the staging deploy fails unless you export AWS_REGION=us-east-1 first. Bit us twice this week.

content.text: Good to know - that is a classic gotcha. I'll note it in the runbook.
I cannot check the clock, but your terminal can: run date.
